input.userPrompt: How many critical alerts are open right now? Reply with just the number.
Present the migration assessment as a polished Markdown report with risks and recommendations.
input.assistantResponse:
# Migration Assessment

## Summary

The schema can move incrementally with one compatibility shim.

## Risks

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|---|---|---|
| Dual writes drift | High | Reconcile hourly |
| Old clients | Medium | Retain the shim |

## Recommendation

Use a three-phase rollout with explicit rollback gates.

input.userPrompt: Show the incident handoff sequence as a diagram.

content.text:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Pager
  participant OnCall
  participant Lead
  Pager->>OnCall: Trigger alert
  OnCall->>Lead: Escalate incident
  Lead-->>OnCall: Approve rollback
